Package com.gpudb.protocol

Class DeleteResourceGroupResponse

java.lang.Object
com.gpudb.protocol.DeleteResourceGroupResponse
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.apache.avro.generic.GenericContainer, org.apache.avro.generic.IndexedRecord
public class DeleteResourceGroupResponse extends Object implements org.apache.avro.generic.IndexedRecord
A set of results returned by GPUdb.deleteResourceGroup.
